commands.name: ping
commands.description: Verify bridge connectivity and report server identity.
commands.result: Plugin identity, project path, and server status.

commands.name: list_commands
commands.description: List supported bridge commands from the contract.

commands.name: get_recent_logs
commands.description: Read recent bridge, validation, and build log lines.

args.name: limit
args.description: Maximum number of recent lines to return.

commands.name: editor_state
commands.description: Read the current edited scene and play state.
commands.result: Edited scene path, root node name, and play-state.

commands.name: open_scene
commands.description: Open a scene in the running Godot editor.

args.name: path
args.description: Scene path as res://... or project-relative.

commands.name: save_scene
commands.description: Save the current edited scene, optionally to a specific path.

commands.name: project_state
commands.result: Project path, Godot version, C# detection, config state, export preset summary, and validation summary.

commands.name: get_arcade_project_config
commands.description: Read the committed arcade project config file if present.
commands.result: Parsed config object or null when missing.

commands.name: upsert_arcade_project_config
commands.description: Merge and normalize arcade project config updates.
commands.result: Updated config object and config file path.

args.name: patch
args.description: Partial config object to merge into the existing config.

commands.name: generate_arcade_manifest_preview
commands.description: Resolve the exact release manifest that would be written into the export bundle.

commands.name: list_export_presets
commands.description: List Godot export preset summaries from export_presets.cfg.

commands.name: ensure_arcade_web_export_preset
commands.description: Create or update the arcade web export preset without mutating unrelated presets.
commands.result: Preset summary and validation after the update.

commands.name: validate_arcade_web_export_preset
commands.description: Validate the active arcade web export preset against KillaTamata rules.
commands.result: Blocking issues, warnings, and the resolved preset summary.

commands.name: validate_arcade_project
commands.description: Validate arcade config completeness, cover asset staging readiness, unsupported modes, and export readiness.
commands.result: Structured readiness report with blocking issues, warnings, inferred values, manifest preview, and export preset summary.

commands.name: build_arcade_release
commands.description: Validate, export, stage the cover asset, verify, and package the Godot Web release bundle.
commands.result: Staging directory, ZIP path, manifest, file inventory, and both source and staged cover image paths.

commands.name: reveal_arcade_build
commands.description: Reveal the current arcade staging directory in the local file browser.

notes: The bridge is localhost-only by default and supports an optional shared-secret token.
The addon owns res://killatamata.arcade.json and res://.gotamata/arcade_builds for arcade publishing state.
C# projects and threaded web exports are treated as blocking issues for KillaTamata Arcade V1.
Remote KillaTamata submission stays in the agent-side submission client, not inside the Godot addon.
